title: rudbeckia cicutefolia
intro: Rudbeckia cicutefolia, also known as Black-eyed Susan or Cutleaf Coneflower, is a flowering plant native to the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rudbeckia cicutefolia include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
